response.justification: The candidate meets the minimum bar with roughly 19 years of hands-on software engineering across web, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems, plus genuine entrepreneurial experience as an open-source platform founder. However, the role is a director-level AI strategy position requiring recognized AI expertise and demonstrated AI products; the candidate's AI exposure is recent and tooling-oriented (MCP code generators, agentic workflow infrastructure) rather than deep, and there is no evidence of principal-level scope, strategic advisory work, or engineering leadership beyond senior IC roles.
strengths: 19+ years of broad engineering experience exceeding the 15-year minimum
Founder experience building and operating an open-source geo-data platform
Recent hands-on work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling
concerns: No recognized AI expertise or demonstrated AI products at platform scale
Career trajectory is senior/staff IC, well below director-level strategic scope
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and limited cloud-strategy evidence

key_factors.factor: Seniority and scope gap for principal/director level
Limited depth of AI expertise relative to role focus
Long tenure, breadth, and entrepreneurial background
